subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Covenant! Thou hast inquired regarding the printing of the Sacred Writings at the governmental press. In response, it is thus conveyed [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان در خصوص طبع آثار در مطبعه دولتی مرقوم نموده بودید جواب از
subcodes.subjects: @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings, @review of publications, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @wisdom [hikmat], @martyrs and martyrdom
